description: Brand guidelines and compliance rules for BYD marketing

rules.rule: Always use official BYD logo. Never stretch, distort, or recolor.
Use brand colors consistently. Avoid neon, overly bright, or clashing combinations.
Maximum 2 font families per design. Maintain hierarchy with weight and size.
Maintain generous white space. Never crowd elements. Luxury brands breathe.
Use only high-resolution professional images. No pixelation, compression artifacts, or watermarks.
Every piece must have a clear, single CTA. Avoid multiple competing actions.
Always display accurate OTR pricing. Include disclaimer for terms and conditions.
Respect all Malaysian cultures and religious sensitivities. Avoid stereotypes.
When comparing, be factual and respectful. Never disparage competitors.
Maintain consistent brand voice across all platforms. Adapt format, not message.
Festive designs must match brand quality standards. No cheap clipart or generic templates.
AI-generated content must be reviewed by human. Never publish AI content unverified.

rejectionReasons: Generic AI design — lacks brand personality
Cheap festive template — does not meet premium standards
Poor typography — wrong hierarchy or font pairing
Bad spacing — elements too crowded or misaligned
Weak CTA — unclear or buried in design
Wrong colours — does not match brand palette
Inconsistent branding — does not reflect BYD identity
Brand violation — logo misuse or incorrect naming
Low resolution image — not suitable for professional use
Cultural insensitivity — potentially offensive to target audience
